narrative:
Precinct Vernon Township A (precinct in Scioto County) has 433 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a modest Republican lean of 2.8 percentage points.
